arts.sum: And the same situation appears to be manifesting for Carney Chukwuemeka, with the midfielder also likely to be reintegrated into the Chelsea fold by Maresca. arts.ttl: Why £72m star is banned from Bournemouth vs Chelsea ahead of Premier League match
arts.sum: Kepa has been with Chelsea since 2018 after joining from Athletic Bilbao and Premier League rules state he is not allowed to play his parent club. Chelsea will return to Premier League action against Bournemouth on Saturday evening following the international break.
